metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Authentication ASIM filtering parser for Palo Alto Prisma Cloud Compute
properties.query:
let parser = (
    starttime: datetime = datetime(null),
    endtime: datetime = datetime(null),
    srcipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    srchostname_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    username_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    targetappname_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    eventtype_in: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    eventresult: string = "*",
    eventresultdetails_in: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    disabled: bool = false,
    pack: bool = false
) {
PrismaCloud_CL
| where not(disabled)
    and (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime)
    and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
    and (array_length(username_has_any) == 0 or SyslogMessage has_any (username_has_any))
    and (array_length(targetappname_has_any) == 0 or "Prisma Cloud Compute" has_any (targetappname_has_any))
    and (array_length(srchostname_has_any) == 0)
    and (array_length(eventtype_in) == 0 or "Logon" in~ (eventtype_in))
| where ProcessName == "Twistlock-Console"
| parse-kv SyslogMessage as (
    ['time']:string,
    ['type']:string,
    id:string,
    log_type:string,
    username:string,
    source_ip:string,
    api:string,
    status:string
)
with (pair_delimiter=' ', kv_delimiter='=', quote='"')
| where ['type'] == "management_audit" and log_type == "login"
| where (array_length(username_has_any) == 0 or username in~ (username_has_any))
    and (array_length(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0 or has_any_ipv4_prefix(source_ip, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix))
| extend
    EventStartTime = coalesce(todatetime(['time']), EventTime),
    EventEndTime = coalesce(todatetime(['time']), EventTime),
    EventResult = case(
        status == "successful login attempt", "Success",
        status in ("invalid credentials", "expired token"), "Failure",
        "NA"
    ),
    EventResultDetails = case(
        status == "invalid credentials", "No such user or password",
        status == "expired token", "Session expired",
        ""
    ),
    EventSeverity = case(
        SeverityLevel =~ "info", "Informational",
        SeverityLevel =~ "warning", "Medium",
        SeverityLevel =~ "error", "High",
        SeverityLevel =~ "critical", "High",
        "Informational"
    ),
    SrcIpAddr = iff(isnotnull(parse_ipv4(source_ip)), source_ip, ""),
    DvcIpAddr = iff(isnotnull(parse_ipv4(HostIP)), HostIP, ""),
    DvcId = _ResourceId,
    DvcIdType = iff(isnotempty(_ResourceId), "AzureResourceId", ""),
    TargetUsername = username,
    TargetUsernameType = iff(isnotempty(username), "Simple", ""),
    TargetAppName = "Prisma Cloud Compute",
    TargetAppType = "Service",
    TargetHostname = iff(HostName matches regex @"^[a-zA-Z0-9-]{1,61}$", HostName, ""),
    DvcHostname = iff(HostName matches regex @"^[a-zA-Z0-9-]{1,61}$", HostName, ""),
    EventUid = hash_sha256(strcat(TenantId, EventTime, SyslogMessage, CollectorHostName))
| where (eventresult == "*" or EventResult == eventresult)
    and (array_length(eventresultdetails_in) == 0 or EventResultDetails in~ (eventresultdetails_in))
| extend
    Src = source_ip,
    IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
    Dst = iff(isnotempty(TargetHostname), TargetHostname, TargetAppName),
    Dvc = iff(isnotempty(DvcHostname), DvcHostname, TargetAppName),
    User = TargetUsername,
    Application = TargetAppName,
    AdditionalFields = iff(
        pack,
        bag_pack(
            "MG", MG,
            "HostIP", HostIP,
            "HostName", HostName,
            "Computer", Computer,
            "Facility", Facility,
            "CollectorHostName", CollectorHostName,
            "ProcessName", ProcessName,
            "ProcessID", ProcessID,
            "SourceSystem", SourceSystem,
            "WorkspaceId", TenantId,
            "MessageId", id
        ),
        dynamic({})
    )
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Type,
    EventCount = int(1),
    EventStartTime,
    EventEndTime,
    EventType = "Logon",
    EventResult,
    EventResultDetails,
    EventOriginalType = ['type'],
    EventOriginalSubType = log_type,
    EventOriginalResultDetails = status,
    EventSeverity,
    EventOriginalSeverity = SeverityLevel,
    EventUid,
    EventMessage = SyslogMessage,
    EventProduct = "Prisma Cloud Compute",
    EventVendor = "Palo Alto",
    EventSchema = "Authentication",
    EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.4",
    LogonMethod = iff(api == "/api/v1/authenticate", "Username & Password", "Other"),
    TargetUsername,
    TargetUsernameType,
    User,
    SrcIpAddr,
    Src,
    IpAddr,
    TargetAppName,
    TargetAppType,
    Application,
    TargetHostname,
    Dst,
    DvcId,
    DvcIdType,
    DvcIpAddr,
    DvcHostname,
    DvcOs = SourceSystem,
    Dvc,
    AdditionalFields
};
parser(starttime=starttime, endtime=endtime, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix=srcipaddr_has_any_prefix, srchostname_has_any=srchostname_has_any, username_has_any=username_has_any, targetappname_has_any=targetappname_has_any, eventtype_in=eventtype_in, eventresult=eventresult, eventresultdetails_in=eventresultdetails_in, disabled=disabled, pack=pack)
